name: Strawberry Glace Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Bake pie shell.
2. Mash enough berries to measure 1 cup. Stir together sugar and cornstarch.
3. Gradually stir in water and crushed strawberries. Cook over medium heat,
stirring constantly, until the mixture thickens and boils. Boil and stir
for 1 minute. Cool.
4. Beat cream cheese until smooth; spread on bottom of cooked pie shell.
5. Fill shell with remaining sliced berries; pour cooked berry mixture
over top. Chill at least 3 hours or until set.
VARIATIONS:
Peaches Glace Pie: Substitute 5 cups sliced fresh peaches (7 medium) for the strawberries. To prevent peaches from darkening, use lemon juice or an ascorbic acid mixture.
Raspberry Glace Pie: Substitute 6 cups fresh raspberries for the strawberries.
